title: ajuga chamaepitys subsp. chia
intro: Ajuga chamaepitys subsp. chia, also known as Chia Bugle or Chia Ajuga, is a subspecies of Ajuga chamaepitys, a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ajuga chamaepitys subsp. chia include its potential to reduce stress, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
